name: Legacy FCC Keepalive
description: Original upstream four-frame periodic sequence, retained as a reverse-engineering reference only. Since 1.5.48 the runtime no longer sends it: the five-second Auto FCC mode reads the country and re-applies fcc.json only when it no longer matches the target. The exact necessity and semantics of these four requests are unverified.

frames.note: Opaque 10:58 request; identical to the final request
Opaque 06:72 radio request; exact parameter semantics are unverified
Opaque 06:72 radio request; commit interpretation is unverified
Opaque 10:58 request; identical to the initial request
